patients.name: gender
patients.notes: Synthea uses coded values: M = male/nam, F = female/nu.

medications.name: description
medications.notes: Medication name/type. Use this column when asking about drug/medicine/thuoc types or most frequent medications.

prompt_rules: Use only visible tables and columns from the schema.

Prefer aggregate queries and add LIMIT only for ranked/top/list outputs. Do not add LIMIT for questions asking totals by each year/tung nam, by each status/tung trang thai, or by each category/tung loai unless the question says top.
Use COUNT(*) for rows/events. Use COUNT(DISTINCT patient) only when asking how many unique patients had a condition/event. For the patients table itself, use patients.id or COUNT(*).
For questions by gender/theo gioi tinh, group by patients.gender. Do not filter M/F unless asking only male/nam or female/nu.
For patients.gender, use Synthea codes: male/nam = 'M', female/nu = 'F'. Never use 'male' or 'female'.
For disease/condition filters such as Diabetes or Hypertension, filter conditions.description with ILIKE. Do not invent condition code values.
For medication/drug/thuoc type questions, use medications.description as the medication name/type. The medications table has no id column.
For procedure/thu thuat questions, use the procedures table, not medications.
For claim cost by encounter class, use encounters.total_claim_cost and encounters.encounterclass, not the claims table.
For organization/facility/co so y te names, use organizations.name.

If the question asks medications that appear most often/xuat hien nhieu nhat, do not join patients or encounters. Use exactly this pattern: SELECT description, COUNT(*) AS total FROM medications GROUP BY description ORDER BY total DESC.
observations.value is text; cast only after filtering numeric rows with value ~ '^-?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$'. Never use CAST(value AS numeric) IS NOT NULL.
Return compact JSON only, for example {"sql":"SELECT ...","reasoning":"..."}.

prompt_examples.question: Có bao nhiêu bệnh nhân theo giới tính?
prompt_examples.sql: SELECT gender, COUNT(*) AS total FROM patients GROUP BY gender ORDER BY total DESC;

prompt_examples.question: Có bao nhiêu bệnh nhân nam?
prompt_examples.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_male_patients FROM patients WHERE gender = 'M';

prompt_examples.question: Số lượt khám theo từng năm là bao nhiêu?
prompt_examples.sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start) AS year, COUNT(*) AS total_encounters FROM encounters GROUP BY year ORDER BY year;

prompt_examples.question: Có bao nhiêu bệnh nhân từng có chẩn đoán liên quan đến Diabetes?
prompt_examples.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT patient) AS total_patients FROM conditions WHERE description ILIKE '%diabetes%';

prompt_examples.question: Top 10 thủ thuật phổ biến nhất là gì?
prompt_examples.sql: SELECT description, COUNT(*) AS total FROM procedures GROUP BY description ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10;

prompt_examples.question: Giá trị trung bình của các observation dạng số phổ biến nhất là bao nhiêu?
prompt_examples.sql: SELECT description, AVG(value::NUMERIC) AS avg_value, units FROM observations WHERE value ~ '^-?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$' GROUP BY description, units ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10;

prompt_examples.question: Chi phí claim trung bình theo từng loại encounter là bao nhiêu?
prompt_examples.sql: SELECT encounterclass, AVG(total_claim_cost) AS avg_claim_cost FROM encounters GROUP BY encounterclass ORDER BY avg_claim_cost DESC;
